name: X: Open Inbox
summary: Open the X DM inbox in a fresh tab and report whether the inbox shell or the passcode onboarding gate is showing.
description: Open the authenticated X DM inbox in a fresh tab and return whether the inbox shell, the compose surface, or the X Chat passcode-onboarding gate is present. Use to confirm inbox reachability before calling a DM-send or DM-reply workflow. Do not use to read individual DM threads (use `x_open_dm_thread` for that).

steps.name: Open the X Chat inbox in a fresh tab

target.selector: main [data-testid='dm-container'], main [data-testid='dm-inbox-panel'], main [data-testid='dm-conversation-panel'], main [data-testid='dm-empty-inbox'], main [data-testid='dm-new-chat-button'], main [data-testid='DmScrollerContainer'], main [href*='/messages/'], main [href*='/i/chat/'], main div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now'], a[data-testid='NewDM_Button']

steps.name: Wait for the inbox shell or onboarding gate

inputs.script: const q = (sel) => document.querySelectorAll(sel); const has = (sel) => !!document.querySelector(sel); return { url: location.href, thread_link_count: q("main a[href*='/messages/'], main a[href*='/i/chat/']").length, composer_present: has("div[data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput']"), pin_onboarding_present: has("button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now']"), new_dm_button_present: has("a[data-testid='NewDM_Button'], main [data-testid='dm-new-chat-button']"), inbox_shell_present: has("main [data-testid='dm-container'], main [data-testid='dm-inbox-panel']"), empty_inbox_present: has("main [data-testid='dm-empty-inbox']"), empty_conversation_state_present: has("main [data-testid='dm-empty-conversation-state']") };

steps.name: Read the inbox or onboarding state

help.summary: Open the X DM inbox in a fresh tab and report whether the inbox shell or the passcode onboarding gate is showing.
returns: { url, thread_link_count, composer_present, pin_onboarding_present, new_dm_button_present, inbox_shell_present, empty_inbox_present, empty_conversation_state_present }.
notes: If `pin_onboarding_present` is true, finish the X Chat passcode setup manually before using DM-send or DM-reply workflows.
`inbox_shell_present` is true when the new X DM UI (data-testid='dm-container' / 'dm-inbox-panel') has mounted, even if there are zero threads.
`empty_inbox_present` is true when X shows the empty-inbox placeholder (data-testid='dm-empty-inbox') — i.e. the account has no DM threads yet.
Opens a fresh tab so other workflows can run in parallel against the same browser session.
